name: Broccoli in Oyster Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash broccoli and drain in a sieve. Cut the tops into florets. Make stalks into matchsticks about 3 inches in length.
2. In a heated wok, add peanut oil until smoke starts to rise. Add broccoli, salt. Stir and mix well.
3. Add 2 tablespoons of water, cover with a lid. Cook on high heat for 3-4 minutes until steam escapes from the edge of the lid. Remove and drain in a sieve before placing on a plate.
4. In a saucepan, combine oyster sauce, tapioca starch, water, sesame seed oil, and light soy sauce. When done, pour over broccoli. Serve hot.
